case_title: CHIODO FRANK A VS BRADY NELSON J

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CHIODO FRANK A AS TO DEFENDANT BRADY NELSON J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRADY NELSON J

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIODO FRANK A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADY NELSON J $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,012.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THIS MATTER WAS PLACED UNDER SUBMISSION BY REFEREE AGATHA HOFF ON 1/24/91
